Sultan Muhammad

Illuminated Folio from a Gulistan (Rose Garden) of Sa'di (c. 1213–1291)
by Sultan Muhammad
Iran, Tabriz, Safavid period (1501-1722) · c. 1475–1500; border: c. 1550 · Gum tempera, ink, gold, and silver on paper
←Isfahani, Ali Muhammad Muisca→
